description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior features a mix of white and light wood paneling, with large floor-to-ceiling windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. A spacious balcony with blue-tinted glass railings wraps around part of the upper floor, while the ground level includes a patio area with outdoor seating and a tree planted in a dedicated space. The house has multiple entry points, including a main door set into a wood-paneled section and several sliding glass doors leading to outdoor spaces. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, with a variety of window sizes and placements on each facade. The overall aesthetic is minimalist and contemporary, emphasizing open spaces and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roof, large windows, wood and white paneling, and spacious balconies with blue glass railings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, large windows, a tree on the patio, and blue glass balcony railings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wood-paneled section, blue glass balcony, and minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Rear view with tall windows, the main door, and a clear view of the wood and white exterior contrast.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the patio, tree, and extensive blue glass balcony wrapping around the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a flush door set in wood paneling, no steps, and a covered patio area.
